# Bundled fonts

Faces shipped with Library Tool. They are bundled locally so the
desktop app never reaches out for chrome assets, and so the font
pickers in Settings do not depend on what is installed on the
machine. See `docs/fonts.md`.

## Chrome

Offered in the Settings font pickers.

- `roboto-slab-var.woff2` -- Roboto Slab (serif, weight 100 900, normal), 34,236 bytes.
  Source: Google Fonts (fonts.gstatic.com), Roboto Slab variable v36, latin subset.
  Licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1 (https://github.com/googlefonts/robotoslab).
